testcase.name: test_html_string_generated_inline_css

failure.message:
ImportError: Module css_inline not found. Run the following to install.
`pip install css-inline`

testcase.failure:
gt_tbl_small = GT(_tbl_data= num char 0 0.1111 apricot 1 2.2220 banana, _body=<great_tables._gt_data.Body object at 0x1...'quarto', type='logical', value=False)), _google_font_imports=GoogleFontImports(imports=frozenset()), _has_built=False) snapshot = SnapshotAssertion(name='snapshot', num_executions=0)
def test_html_string_generated_inline_css(gt_tbl_small: GT, snapshot: str): > assert snapshot == gt_tbl_small.as_raw_html(inline_css=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_export.py:51: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ great_tables/_export.py:237: in as_raw_html _try_import(name="css_inline", pip_install_line="pip install css-inline") _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
name = 'css_inline', pip_install_line = 'pip install css-inline'
def _try_import(name: str, pip_install_line: str | None = None) -> ModuleType: try: return importlib.import_module(name) except ImportError: if pip_install_line is not None: > raise ImportError( f"Module {name} not found. Run the following to install." f"\n\n`{pip_install_line}`" ) from None E ImportError: Module css_inline not found. Run the following to install. E E `pip install css-inline`
great_tables/_utils.py:23: ImportError

testcase.name: test_html_string_generated_inline_css_make_page

failure.message:
ImportError: Module css_inline not found. Run the following to install.
`pip install css-inline`

testcase.failure:
gt_tbl_small = GT(_tbl_data= num char 0 0.1111 apricot 1 2.2220 banana, _body=<great_tables._gt_data.Body object at 0x1...'quarto', type='logical', value=False)), _google_font_imports=GoogleFontImports(imports=frozenset()), _has_built=False) snapshot = SnapshotAssertion(name='snapshot', num_executions=0)
def test_html_string_generated_inline_css_make_page(gt_tbl_small: GT, snapshot: str): > assert snapshot == gt_tbl_small.as_raw_html(inline_css=True, make_page=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_export.py:55: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ great_tables/_export.py:237: in as_raw_html _try_import(name="css_inline", pip_install_line="pip install css-inline") _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
name = 'css_inline', pip_install_line = 'pip install css-inline'
def _try_import(name: str, pip_install_line: str | None = None) -> ModuleType: try: return importlib.import_module(name) except ImportError: if pip_install_line is not None: > raise ImportError( f"Module {name} not found. Run the following to install." f"\n\n`{pip_install_line}`" ) from None E ImportError: Module css_inline not found. Run the following to install. E E `pip install css-inline`

testcase.name: test_html_string_generated_all_important

failure.message:
ImportError: Module css_inline not found. Run the following to install.
`pip install css-inline`

testcase.failure:
gt_tbl_small = GT(_tbl_data= num char 0 0.1111 apricot 1 2.2220 banana, _body=<great_tables._gt_data.Body object at 0x1...'quarto', type='logical', value=False)), _google_font_imports=GoogleFontImports(imports=frozenset()), _has_built=False)
def test_html_string_generated_all_important(gt_tbl_small: GT): assert "!important;" in gt_tbl_small.as_raw_html(inline_css=False, all_important=True) > assert "!important;" in gt_tbl_small.as_raw_html(inline_css=True, all_important=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_export.py:60: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ great_tables/_export.py:237: in as_raw_html _try_import(name="css_inline", pip_install_line="pip install css-inline") _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
name = 'css_inline', pip_install_line = 'pip install css-inline'
def _try_import(name: str, pip_install_line: str | None = None) -> ModuleType: try: return importlib.import_module(name) except ImportError: if pip_install_line is not None: > raise ImportError( f"Module {name} not found. Run the following to install." f"\n\n`{pip_install_line}`" ) from None E ImportError: Module css_inline not found. Run the following to install. E E `pip install css-inline`
great_tables/_utils.py:23: ImportError

testcase.name: test_fmt_units[kg^2 m^-1-kg2 m−1]
test_fmt_units[10^3 kg^2 m^-1-103 kg2 m−1]
test_fmt_units[x10^3 kg^2 m^-1-×103 kg2 m−1]
test_fmt_units[m^2 s_0-m2 <tag> s0]
